calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Dec-14-2017 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-13-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Line #8
Judge Pro Tem: Josh Klipp, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Jose Torres is present in pro per
Defendant James Ades is present.
Attorney Hannah Kim appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of December 18, 2017 is vacated. (501)
